steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage shows an artist “was chosen for her lifetime contributions to the arts” within the context of an exceptional arts fellowship. The blank must describe what the fellowship does for these artists—recognition and celebration.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choice
steps.content: ”Honor” precisely conveys respect and celebration—what the passage's positive context requires. The other three fail to capture this sense of recognition. That matches choice D—D is correct.
